path.aria-label: Youth is not a time of life; it is a state of mind; it is not a matter of rosy cheeks, red lips and supple knees; it is a matter of the will, a quality of the imagina- tion, a vigor of the emotions; it is the freshness of the deep springs of life. Youth is not a time of life; it is a state of mind; it is not a matter of rosy cheeks, red lips and supple knees; it is a matter of the will, imagination, a vigor of the emotions; it is the freshness of the deep springs of life.
